notes: Carl and Donut leave the guild (Mordecai now his registered guide until Floor 4) and crawl east through Floor 1. Donut ambush-zaps a Level-3 Bad Llama with Magic Missile; Carl finishes it bare-handed, breaking then quickly regenerating his hand, and loots llama meat and meth. They grind through rats and Scatterer roaches — Carl killing everything with his bare feet — reaching Level 3 and learning Foot Soldier and Smush. Exhausted (Fatigued), they finally reach a safe room.

set.location: World Dungeon — Floor 1 (eastern tunnels, reaching a safe room)

add.name: Uncooked Llama Steak
add.description: Raw meat looted from the Bad Llama; added a Food Items menu to Carl's inventory.

add.name: Baggie of Trailer-Park-Grade Meth
add.description: Looted from the Bad Llama; added a Pharmaceuticals menu to Carl's inventory.

add.name: Rat Pelt
add.description: Pelts dropped by the Level-2 rat mobs (multiple collected).

add.name: Scatterer Carapace
add.description: Dropped by a Scatterer (giant cockroach); added itself to Carl's Crafting Items menu.

add.name: Foot Soldier
add.description: Increases the damage Carl deals by kicking. Gained at Level 3.

add.name: Smush
add.description: Killing with your bare feet by pressing down until life ceases. The unshod-foot pressure you can bring to bear is increased by 10% per level. Gained at Level 3.

add.name: Fatigued
add.description: A tiredness condition shown in the health menu; not cured by Regeneration — Carl needs to rest in a safe area.

add.name: Looted a Corpse
add.reward: You've received a Bronze Adventurer Box!
add.description: Looted the Bad Llama's corpse for the first time.

add.name: Shared Experience
add.reward: You've received a Bronze Adventurer Box!
add.description: Shared experience with a party member (Donut) after a kill.

update.note: Now Carl's registered guide: re-entering any training guild returns him to Mordecai's room for questions. Carl will lose access to him once he reaches Floor 4. Parting warning: 'It's not worth it, no matter what they tell you. Not until floor 12, and even then, negotiate as much as you can.'

sources.quote: I hit level three and gained a skill called Foot Soldier, and a second one called Smush.
Smush: Skill Level 3 ... Taking your bare foot, placing it on top of a living, conscious life, and then pressing lovingly down ... increased by 10% with each level of this skill.
Poor Llama skin. Uncooked Llama steaks X2. Baggie of trailer park-grade meth X2. ... I added the rest of the items to my inventory. My inventory added two new menus: Food Items and Pharmaceuticals.
In my health menu it listed me as Fatigued. It didn’t cure itself with my regeneration. We had to find one of the rest areas.
“I’m now your registered guide, so feel free to come back here if you have any additional questions. You’ll lose access to me once you hit the fourth floor.”
